name: @ts-fix/rules-graph-effect
description: Effect-native rewrite of ts-fix's GRAPH-tier rules: `no-import-cycles` (RULE-015, 3-color iterative DFS) and `no-unused-exports` (RULE-025 dead-code row, gated `requires:["app"]`). Two pure plain-TS graph predicates on the @ts-fix/rules-core-effect substrate (defineGraphRule / runGraphRule over a ModuleGraph), consuming the canonical Diagnostic/RuleMeta from @ts-fix/contracts-effect. GRAPH rules analyze the cross-file module graph, NOT a single-file AST — they never touch the TS compiler API, so `typescript` is a DEV dependency (only tsc needs it).
